name: minty
description: Minty profile for Apex Workflow. Product truth stays in Minty docs; Apex only configures the workflow.

sections.qualityTesting: Read before finishing non-trivial code changes.
sections.gitnexus: Read before GitNexus-backed routing or impact checks.
sections.uxUi: Read before frontend or interaction changes.
sections.designSystem: Read before frontend or interaction changes.
sections.pipelineIngestion: Read before provider, sync, cron, or provenance changes.
sections.browserAutomation: Read only when browser work is needed.
sections.worktrees: Read only when worktree flow is needed.

modes.useWhen: Single known file, no durable state, no cross-surface risk.
One route, helper, service, or component owner with obvious callers.
Shared shell, store, hook, auth, profile, workspace, or multi-route coupling.
Named Linear issue or dirty multi-slice continuation.
Product, design, architecture, or workflow decision before code.
Implementation appears landed; remaining work is review, Linear, audit, or wait state.

tracker.authorityRule: Linear reflects execution state; PRD and tracker define product truth and shipped reality.
recordWhen: user-facing flow, contract, or cross-surface behavior
likely follow-up, coordination, or prioritization need
roadmap, scope, acceptance-criteria, or sequencing change
tracker.activeCodingState: In Progress means active coding only.

mcp.install: Install GitNexus as an MCP server in the host agent, index the repo with npx gitnexus analyze, then verify gitnexus tools and gitnexus:// resources are visible to the agent.

wrapperFallback.setup: Minty keeps a repo-local wrapper because MCP/local storage has been unreliable in this environment.

freshnessGate.preSliceRefresh: Required when status is stale, missing, or marked refreshRequired.
freshnessGate.postSliceSkipReason: Required when post-slice refresh is intentionally skipped.

codeIntelligence.fallback: Use the repo-local wrapper from docs/runbooks/gitnexus-local-workflow.md plus focused rg/sed caller confirmation when GitNexus MCP is stale, unavailable, or suspiciously low-signal.
codeIntelligence.highRiskWarning: Warn before proceeding when impact is HIGH or CRITICAL.

browser.policy: Functional browser evidence only; visible UI changes still need a short human visual audit checklist.

uiUx.browserEvidencePolicy: functional-only for Minty screenshots until scale mismatch is resolved
principles: trust cues and provenance are feature contract
Terminal and Basic are densities of one product
